What does a Himalayan salt massage do?
How many hours should you keep a Himalayan salt lamp on?

expanded_element.title: How to stop Himalayan salt lamp from sweating - Salt World
expanded_element.description: Keep your lamp on all day and night to stop your Himalayan salt lamp from sweating and leaking. Switching on the lamp 24/7 or at least 16 hours a day keeps the natural salt crystal warm and helps to dry it out. A warm lamp evaporates any excess moisture and there is no more salt lamp leaking or sweating.

items.title: Can pink salt help with allergies?

expanded_element.title: Himalayan Salt Therapy is Helpful for Allergies!
expanded_element.description: How does it work? The salt actually captures the allergies in the air and reduces moisture in the air allowing for a fresher breath of air in each inhale. The pink crystals in the salt lamps or a Himalayan salt room emit negative ions into the air which helps clear the air in what is known as “passive salt therapy.”

items.title: Is Himalayan salt stone massage worth it?

expanded_element.title: The Benefits of Himalayan Salt Stone Massage
expanded_element.description: One major benefit of this massage is an improvement in the skin's appearance. The mineral content in Himalayan salt provides exfoliation and improves circulation, leaving the Clients' skin looking smooth and soft. As this massage utilizes heated salt stones, Himalayan salt can also work as an anti-inflammatory tool.
